sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER, group_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 10, 'A'), (2, NULL, 'A'), (3, 25, 'B'), (4, 30, 'B'), (5, 5, 'A'), (6, NULL, 'B');
SELECT group_value, nth_value(value & 15, 2) AS second_value FROM (SELECT id, value, group_value FROM test_table ORDER BY value) AS inner_query GROUP BY group_value HAVING COUNT(value) > 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (num INTEGER, group_num VARCHAR(255));

SELECT a.group_num, nth_value(a.num & -1, 1) AS first_value, nth_value(a.num & 7, 2) AS second_value FROM another_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.group_num = b.group_value GROUP BY a.group_num HAVING first_value IS NOT NULL;
WITH CTE AS (SELECT id, value & 3 AS masked_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT nth_value(masked_value, 1) FROM CTE;
SELECT DISTINCT nt.group_value, nt.id & 255 AS bitwise_result FROM (SELECT group_value, id FROM test_table) nt WHERE (id & 3) = 0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value & 7 AS reduced_value FROM test_table WHERE group_value = 'A';
SELECT nth_value(reduced_value, 1) FROM temp_table HAVING nth_value(reduced_value, 2) IS NOT NULL;
